result = base32.encode0(empty)  # Call encode0 with empty byte array
self.assertEqual(len(result), 0, "empty Base32 encode")  # Assert result length is 0
self.assertIsNone(base32.encode0(None), "empty Base32 encode")  # Assert encoding None returns None
empty = bytearray()  # Equivalent to byte[] empty = {};
result = base32.encode0(empty)  # Call encode0 with empty byte array
self.assertEqual(len(result), 0, "empty Base32 encode")  # Assert result length is 0
self.assertIsNone(base32.encode0(None), "empty Base32 encode")  # Assert encoding None returns None
empty = bytearray()  # Equivalent to byte[] empty = {};
base32 = Base32.Base320()  # Instantiate Base32 using the static method
result = base32.encode0(empty)  # Call the encode0 method with the empty byte array
self.assertEqual(len(result), 0, "empty Base32 encode")  # Assert the result length is 0 with a message
base32 = Base32.Base320()  # Re-instantiate Base32 (as in the Java code)
empty = bytearray()  # Equivalent to byte[] empty = {};
base32 = Base32.Base320()  # Call the static method Base320() to get a Base32 instance
result = base32.encode0(empty)  # Call the encode0 method with the empty byte array
self.assertEqual(result, empty)  # Assert that the result is the same as the input
empty = bytes()  # Equivalent to byte[] empty = {};

body:
private static final String[][] BASE32_PAD_TEST_CASES = { // RFC 4648
        {"", ""},
        {"f", "MY%%%%%%"},
        {"fo", "MZXQ%%%%"},
        {"foo", "MZXW6%%%"},
        {"foob", "MZXW6YQ%"},
        {"fooba", "MZXW6YTB"},
        {"foobar", "MZXW6YTBOI%%%%%%"},
    };

private static final String[][] BASE32_TEST_CASES_CHUNKED = { // Chunked
        {"", ""},
        {"f", "MY======\r\n"},
        {"fo", "MZXQ====\r\n"},
        {"foo", "MZXW6===\r\n"},
        {"foob", "MZXW6YQ=\r\n"},
        {"fooba", "MZXW6YTB\r\n"},
        {"foobar", "MZXW6YTBOI======\r\n"},
    };

private static final String[][] BASE32HEX_TEST_CASES = { // RFC 4648
        {"", ""},
        {"f", "CO======"},
        {"fo", "CPNG===="},
        {"foo", "CPNMU==="},
        {"foob", "CPNMUOG="},
        {"fooba", "CPNMUOJ1"},
        {"foobar", "CPNMUOJ1E8======"},
    };
private static final Object[][] BASE32_BINARY_TEST_CASES;
